report.title: Scheduled Task Execution by Known Attacker
report.explanation: A newly scheduled task has been detected on the target host 'windows_agent1' by a known attacker with a high risk score of 1.0 and a history of using various MITRE ATT&CK techniques.
attack_sequence: A Newly Scheduled Task has been Detected on DESKTOP-80FLS88
The attacker has used the technique 'Scheduled Task/Job' (T1053)

iocs.context: Known attacker with a high risk score and a history of using various MITRE ATT&CK techniques
Process used to create the scheduled task

remediation_steps.action: Investigate the scheduled task further to understand its purpose and whether it is malicious.
Block the IP '10.0.2.15' at the network level to prevent any further attacks.
Review and update the Sigma rule 'Scheduled Task/Job At' to improve its detection capabilities for this type of attack.
